Label: Moderate Institutional Trust
Description: This segment shows high trust in the president, armed forces, and supreme court, while maintaining moderate trust (concentrated around 4 and 5) in the justice system, legislature, and municipality. Trust is lowest for political parties and the national police.

Label: Generalized Institutional Distrust
Description: This segment is characterized by very high probabilities of 'Nada' (not at all) across almost all institutions, most notably for political parties (0.85) and the national police (0.76). The only relative exceptions are the president and armed forces, which show more distributed responses and higher probabilities for positive trust levels compared to other items.

Label: Presidential and Military Trust
Description: This segment shows high trust in the president and armed forces, while exhibiting strong distrust toward political parties and the national police.

Label: Very High National Trust
Description: This segment is characterized by very high trust in national institutions, with the highest probabilities of responding 'Mucho' for the president (0.82), public ministry (0.74), armed forces (0.72), and supreme court (0.71).

Label: Broad Institutional Trust
Description: This segment expresses high levels of trust across all measured institutions, with the strongest probabilities concentrated on the 5, 6, and 7 ratings, particularly for the president, armed forces, and the supreme court.
